sections.PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY:
A pre-final year Computer Science (Data Science) undergraduate with hands-on experience in applied machine learning,
analytics, and production-ready ML systems. Skilled in building end-to-end pipelines, scenario-based forecasting models,
and business intelligence dashboards. Strong foundation in statistics, machine learning, and explainable AI, with practical exposure to deployment and decision-oriented analytics.
sections.EXPERIENCE:
Data Stories
Data Analyst (Project-Based Internship) Online
- Developed an interactive hotel management analytics dashboard to support operational and revenue decisionmaking.
- Analyzed booking trends, cancellations, ADR, and seasonal demand to identify occupancy and revenue patterns.
- Designed executive-level KPIs with drill-downs by hotel type, market segment, and time period.
- Converted raw transactional data into actionable insights for pricing strategy and capacity planning.
sections.PROJECTS:
Explainable, Scenario-Based Crop Yield Forecasting System | Python, LightGBM, SHAP, FastAPI, Streamlit
- Built an end-to-end ML system integrating satellite NDVI, climate, soil, and historical yield data.
- Designed production-grade pipelines with schema validation, artifact versioning, and training-serving consistency.
- Implemented teacher-student modeling with ensemble experimentation and deployable LightGBM inference.
- Performed scenario-based robustness analysis by perturbing environmental variables.
- Integrated SHAP explainability directly into inference for interpretable decision support.
Hotel Booking Analytics Dashboard | Tableau, SQL, Excel
- Developed an interactive dashboard analyzing bookings, cancellations, ADR, and seasonal demand.
- Created KPIs to identify revenue leakage, lead-time behavior, and customer segmentation.
